apply: Apply the knowledge of the story to real-life situations
Use the story to illustrate the importance of individual freedom and choice
Make connections between the story and other literary works
analyze: Analyze the use of symbolism in the story
Examine the role of women in the story and its societal implications
Critically evaluate the character development in the story
remember: Recall the plot of the story Ranga's Marriage
Identify the main characters in the story
List the key events that take place in the story
understand: Explain the theme of the story Ranga's Marriage
Describe the social and cultural context of the story
Analyze the character of Ranga and his motivations

ncert_objectives: To understand the plot and its significance
To analyze the character of Ranga and his motivations
To evaluate the theme of the story and its relevance to contemporary society
board_exam_objectives: Identify and explain the theme of the story
Describe the social and cultural context of the story
